Class Dialogue

java.lang.Object
org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Builders.Dialogue
public class Dialogue extends Object
Immutable dialogue definition built via Dialogue.Builder.

A dialogue consists of visual configuration, sounds and one or more Pages.

    Dialogue.Builder
    Builder for Dialogue instances.
